ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of election */,
  "election_label" TEXT /* Label for the election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the election took place */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the election took place */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election data was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate's affiliation */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the candidate is running */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the candidate is running */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the candidate */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the candidate (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affiliation */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the affiliation (e.g., liberal, conservative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_elections" (
  "candidate_election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate-election relationship */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "election_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "name_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the candidate's name (used for disambiguation) */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate during the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_elections_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_elections_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election type */,
  "election_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "election_id" TEXT /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the election */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the election was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used for the access (e.g., filters, sorting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate in the election */,
  "winning_status" TEXT /* Winning status of the candidate (e.g., winner, loser) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "election_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., demographic, historical context) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "data_link" TEXT /* Link to the original data source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "election_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election */,
  "previous_office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous office the candidate held */,
  "previous_affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous affiliation of the candidate */,
  "previous_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received in the previous election */,
  "previous_year" INTEGER /* Year of the previous election */,
  "previous_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate during the previous election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_history_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_history_previous_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_history_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_history_previous_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_offices" (
  "election_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election-office relationship */,
  "election_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_offices_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_offices_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_offices" (
  "candidate_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate-office relationship */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the candidate's term in the office */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the candidate's term in the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_offices_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_offices_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
